name: Mandelic Acid
description: An AHA derived from bitter almonds with a large molecular size, making it extremely gentle.
scientificSummary: Penetrates the skin slowly due to its massive molecule size, providing exfoliation without irritation.
mechanismOfAction: Penetrates the skin slowly due to its massive molecule size, providing exfoliation without irritation.
